images.caption: Figure 2:Efficiency (UU) across researcher iterations for all 12 runs.Left: Cleanup with 8 runs across 2 LLMs×\times2 objectives. Solid lines connectkeptiterations (those for whichJj>J∗+τJ_{j}>J^{*}+\taustrictly exceeded the running-best score;τ=0\tau{=}0in our runs); open circles markdiscardediterations (Jj≤J∗J_{j}\leq J^{*}), which are reverted on disk before the next proposal. Dashed horizontal line: hand-designed baseline fromGallego (2026). All runs converge toU≈3.1U\approx 3.1–3.23.2despite diverse starting points.Right: Gathering with 4 runs (2 per LLM). All converge toU≈2.5U\approx 2.5within 2–4 iterations.

Figure 3:Maximin (mini⁡Ri\min_{i}R_{i}) across researcher iterations for the 4 Cleanup maximin-optimized runs. All runs transform deeply negative baselines (worst-off agents losing reward) into substantially positive values. Gemini reaches∼290{\sim}290while Sonnet reaches∼160{\sim}160–200200. The dashed line marksmini⁡Ri=0\min_{i}R_{i}=0(no agent loses reward overall).

Figure 4:Final metrics across all conditions. (a) Efficiency: all conditions converge toU≈2.5U\approx 2.5–3.23.2. (b) Equality: maximin-optimized Cleanup runs achieveE≈1.0E\approx 1.0, while efficiency-optimized runs showE≈0.5E\approx 0.5–0.70.7; Gathering achieves high equality regardless. (c) Maximin: the sharpest contrast—efficiency optimization leaves the worst-off agent deeply negative (mini⁡Ri≈−200\min_{i}R_{i}\approx{-}200), while maximin optimization transforms it to+290+290(Gemini) or+179+179(Sonnet). Gathering achieves high maximin (∼580{\sim}580) under efficiency optimization alone. Error bars show s.d. across runs.

Figure 5:Mean efficiencyU¯\bar{U}averaged across all inner iterationsof each outer step (compare Figure2, which shows the kept policy only).Left: Cleanup (N=10N{=}10);right: Gathering (N=4N{=}4). The trajectories track Figure2closely, indicating that the researcher’s gains come from improving the entire inner-loop output distribution, not just the best ofKKsamples.

Figure 6:Mean maximinmini⁡Ri¯\overline{\min_{i}R_{i}}averaged across all inner iterationsof each outer step for the 4 CleanupΦmin\Phi_{\min}runs (compare Figure3). The deeply negative baselines lift to∼\sim200–275 mean maximin, only mildly below the kept-policy values of Figure3. The horizontal dashed line marksmini⁡Ri¯=0\overline{\min_{i}R_{i}}=0.
